description: To satisfy an upcoming SOC 2 security audit, the compliance officer requires an on-demand inventory report of all monitored network infrastructure. Create a new Custom Report template in ManageEngine OpManager named 'SOC2-Infrastructure-Inventory'. Select the 'Device' (or Inventory) module as the data source. Configure the report to include exactly these columns: Device Name (or Display Name), IP Address, Vendor, Category, and Uptime. Save the report so it can be generated by the audit team later. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
